summary: Full validation of Table & KDS modules + regression testing of Pulse and TAP modules completed. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all critical flows for Table, TAP, KDS, and Pulse Entry pages.
seed_data_creation: Test sessions/tables created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All modules working correctly. Table, TAP, KDS, and Pulse modules fully functional. KDS requires user to have kds:true permission. TAP uses FormData for POST mutations. Kitchen/Bar routing based on is_alcohol flag.

table_module: POST /api/table/open (FormData) - opens table, returns session_id, status=occupied
GET /api/table/{table_id} - returns table with session and items
POST /api/table/close (FormData) - closes table, records payment, returns status=available
tap_module: GET /api/tap/stats?venue_id=X - returns open_tabs, running_total, closed_today, revenue_today

table_page: Shows 9 tables organized by zones (Bar Counter, Main Floor, Patio, VIP)
Available tables shown in green, occupied in purple
Clicking available table shows guest name input
Opening table shows table detail with session info
Menu catalog displays with category filters
Send to Kitchen/Bar button sends items to KDS
kds_page: Tickets show table number, guest name, items, timestamps
Start Preparing button moves ticket to Preparing column
Mark Ready button moves ticket to Ready column
Complete button removes ticket from list
tap_page: KPIs display (Open Tabs, Running Total, Closed Today, Revenue Today)
New tab button opens guest name form
Tab cards show guest name and total
Menu catalog with category filters (All, Beer, Cocktails, Food, Non-Alcohol, Spirits)
Tab detail shows items with quantities and prices
Card/Cash/Comp payment closes tab and updates stats
pulse_entry_page: KPIs display (Guests Inside, Total Entries, Denied)
NFC scan area and Manual Entry option
Guests Today list shows registered guests
Navigation tabs (Entry, Inside, Bar, Exit, Rewards)

test_classes: TestAuth (2 tests) - login success, invalid credentials
TestTableModule (5 tests) - list tables, auth required, open/close flow, occupied check, 404
TestTapModule (6 tests) - catalog, stats, config, full session flow, list sessions, closed session
TestKdsModule (6 tests) - kitchen tickets, bar tickets, auth required, full KDS flow, entitlement, validation
TestPulseRegression (3 tests) - entries today, inside, venue config
